title: Portlandia proctorii
taxonomy: Portlandia proctorii is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a type of epiphyte, which means it grows on other plants or trees without deriving nutrients from them. The classification of Portlandia proctorii places it within the genus Portlandia, which is part of the family Rubiaceae and is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The family Rubiaceae is a large and diverse group of flowering plants, commonly known as the coffee or madder family. The specific classification of Portlandia proctorii is further supported by its unique characteristics, such as its distinctive flowers and growth habits.

Traditionally, Portlandia proctorii has been used to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory issues, due to its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
